mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO favorites (member_id, store_id, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{storeId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT store_id FROM favorites WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT s.id AS storeId, s.name AS storeName, s.category AS category, s.address AS address, s.open_time AS openTime, s.close_time AS closeTime, f.created_at AS favoritedAt, ( SELECT si.image_url FROM store_images si WHERE si.store_id = s.id ORDER BY si.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS thumbnailUrl FROM favorites f JOIN stores s ON s.id = f.store_id WHERE f.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
